summary: Formal Lean/mathlib release migration gate completed for Lean 4.30.0 stable: lean-toolchain now uses leanprover/lean4:v4.30.0, lakefile.toml requires mathlib v4.30.0, lake-manifest.json was regenerated by lake update mathlib, MathlibSurvey and the full LeanLCAExactChallenge library build under v4.30.0, and the root Lean import check succeeds after regenerating stale project .olean files. This is a migration checkpoint only; product success remains false because the full original four-task positive witness is still absent.
known_gaps: The stable Lean/mathlib v4.30.0 migration gate is complete, but it does not add a new product-success witness or discharge the original four-task contract.
Positive Lean witness is absent: no OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract exists.
The exact-category core now exposes class-level composition-stability fields and the canonical MetrizableLCA instance fills them, but the complete original four-task witness is still absent.

Yoneda one-fold extensions and positive-degree chains now expose their ambient exact-category head inflation/deflation maps and descend relation/split-factor/Baer-sum laws through YonedaExt.ofPositiveChain and into public Yoneda product relation, split-factor, additivity, negation, subtraction, and casted associativity laws for positive-chain representatives and Ext classes; positive-degree casts now preserve zero, addition, negation, subtraction, and public Baer sums; quotient-generator zero/neg/add simp lemmas are available; quotient-wide positive-degree Yoneda product associativity is available both with an explicit target-degree cast and with the canonical omega cast; public Baer-sum group laws are available; quotient-wide Yoneda product neg/sub laws are available in both variables; and public Baer-sum-with-negative-right-summand subtraction laws are available in both variables. The full Yoneda Ext group obligation is still not audited as a final positive witness.
Bounded derived infinity-category integration remains incomplete as an original-contract obligation.
remaining_work: Resume mathematical implementation only after this standalone v4.30.0 migration checkpoint is committed and pushed; continue from the existing exact-category/Yoneda API toward a genuine OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface.

Continue from the strengthened exact-category core, positive-chain representative/class product relation/split/additivity/associativity bridge, positive Yoneda Ext cast additive API, quotient-generator simp API, quotient-wide Yoneda product associativity, public Baer-sum group laws, quotient-wide Yoneda product neg/sub laws, and public Baer-sum negative-right-summand subtraction laws into the remaining Yoneda Ext group integration.
Continue the bounded derived infinity-category positive witness integration only after the exact-category and Yoneda obligations are represented by honest Lean declarations.
verified_commands: jq -r '.packages[] | select(.name=="mathlib" or .name=="aesop" or .name=="Qq" or .name=="batteries" or .name=="Cli") | [.name,.inputRev,.rev] | @tsv' lake-manifest.json
